_comment: Tier-2 for fenics linear_elasticity#0: Vector function space for elasticity must use ('Lagrange', 1, (gdim,)). Passing plain ('Lagrange', 1) gives a SCALAR space; the elasticity weak form fails at form construction (ufl.sym(ufl.grad(u)) on scalar u) with ValueError 'Symmetric part of tensor with rank != 2 is undefined.'. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
expect_in_output: Symmetric part of tensor with rank != 2
